A Promise of Comfort

“

We build patented comfort tech so every Indian sleeps, sits and relaxes comfortably.

Priyanka & Harshil Salot | The Founders

”

The Sleep Company has become one of the prominent players in India's 'Sleep Tech' Market.

Asia's First SmartGRID Mattress. Truly the next generation of sleep.

The SmartGRID® mattress is an excellent investment. Just go for it.

Frequently Asked Questions

FAQ's
01
01 Why is The Sleep Company different? +

We build everything that affects how you sleep, sit and live — all powered by our patented SmartGRID technology. No compromises, ever.

02
02 What is SmartGRID Technology? +

A patented grid that adapts instantly to provide soft comfort and firm back support. With 2500+ air channels, it allows breathability and keeps you cool.

03
03 What products does The Sleep Company offer? +

Mattresses, pillows, Ergonomic office chairs, recliner sofas, recliner beds, seat cushions, adjustable desks and bedding. One brand, every comfort need covered.

04
04 Where can I experience TSC products? +

We have 190+ stores across 80+ cities in India. So you can walk in, try everything and let our Certified Comfort Specialists find your perfect fit at the store.

05
05 Can I try before I buy? +

Visit any store for a hands-on experience or take a mattress home with our 100-night free trial. If you don’t love it, we’ll take it back.* T&C Apply

06
06 Is SmartGRID only in mattresses? +

Not at all. SmartGRID powers our chairs, recliner sofas, cushions and pillows too. Wherever you sit or sleep, it's working for you.

07
07 What warranty do I get? +

Mattresses come with up to 10-year warranty, chairs from 2 to 5 years. All products include free installation and a replacement policy.  See our full warranty policy for details.

08
08 How do I find the right product? +

Use our online recommenders for mattresses, chairs and pillows or visit a store and let our Certified Comfort Specialists guide you in person.

09
09 Do you offer bulk or corporate orders? +

Yes, we work with corporates, hotels and institutions across our full product range. Reach out directly for custom pricing.

India's Most Trusted Comfort Tech Brand

+
The Sleep Company - India's Most Trusted Sleep & Comfort Tech Brand

The Sleep Company - India's Most Trusted Sleep & Comfort Tech Brand

The Sleep Company is one of the top mattress brands in India with robust online and offline stores. Known for our revolutionary grid mattresses made using SmartGRID Technology, we offer a range of SmartGRID mattresses and home furnishing products that cater to every need.

Patented SmartGRID Technology for Peaceful Sleep

SmartGRID Technology is a patented design and material engineered to deliver peaceful sleep and better living.

Our patented Japanese SmartGRID technology, known as The SmartGRID, was developed by DRDO Scientists. The brainchild of our founders Priyanka Salot and Harshil Salot, our SmartGRID mattress range is revolutionizing the way we sleep, sit, and experience comfort.

Made using hyper-elastic polymer, our SmartGRID mattress brings exceptional support, breathability, and adaptability. No more tossing and turning or struggling to achieve that sweet spot. Instead, enjoy peaceful sleep every time you hit the sheets.

SmartGRID Technology offers excellent pressure relief while keeping you cool, so you can say goodbye to aches and sweaty nights.

What Sets SmartGRID Apart?

1. Exclusive Comfort and Support

SmartGRID's unique grid technology is designed to provide the right balance between comfort and support. It adapts to your body shape while maintaining proper back and spine support.

2. Cool and Breathable

With more than 2500+ air channels, SmartGRID mattresses ensure optimal airflow, keeping you cool and comfortable throughout the night.

3. Technology Engineered for Peaceful Sleep

Pressure testing conducted with over 1000 customers showed that SmartGRID mattresses reduce pressure on the body significantly compared to traditional foam mattresses.

4. Offers Motion Isolation

SmartGRID absorbs motion effectively. Even if your partner moves or tosses during the night, you will not feel any disturbance.

5. Keeps Away Aches and Pains

SmartGRID mattresses maintain spinal alignment and provide pressure point relief, helping you wake up refreshed without pain.

6. Hypoallergenic

Our mattresses are free from harmful chemicals and VOCs (Volatile Organic Compounds), making them ideal for people with allergies and sensitivities.

Beyond Comfort & Support

  • Improved Posture: Promotes proper spinal alignment.
  • Enhanced Circulation: Reduces pressure points to improve blood circulation.
  • Reduced Tossing and Turning: Personalized support ensures deeper sleep.
  • Stress Relief: Helps create a relaxing and comfortable sleep environment.
  • Ideal for All: Suitable for all sleeping styles – side, back, or stomach.
  • Disturbance-Free Sleep: Motion isolation ensures uninterrupted sleep.

Explore Full Range of SmartGRID Products

1. SmartGRID Mattresses

Our grid mattresses are built using hyper-elastic food-grade polymer with 2500+ air channels for breathability and comfort. Our mattress range includes orthopedic mattresses, cooling SnowTec mattresses, luxurious Luxe Royale mattresses, and more.

2. Smart Recliner Bed

Our smart recliner bed offers versatile reclining modes for watching TV, reading, or working. Zero-gravity mode reduces spine pressure, while the dual massager provides relaxing comfort.

3. SmartGRID Pillows

Designed for neck and spine alignment, our pillows provide breathable comfort and support healthier sleep posture.

4. Smart Accessories

From bamboo mattress protectors and fitted sheets to seat cushions and neck massagers, The Sleep Company offers everything needed for comfortable sleep and seating.

5. Smart Bundles

Our bundles include mattresses, mattress protectors, and pillows for a complete sleep solution. Options include Luxe, Ortho, SnowTec, and Pregnancy bundles.

6. Smart Recliner Sofa

Our motorized recliner sofas provide ultimate comfort with reclining up to 150° and rotation up to 270° at the push of a button.

7. Office Chairs

SmartGRID office chairs provide ergonomic support with adjustable lumbar support for long work hours.

8. Gaming Chairs

Ergo Smart Pro Gaming Chairs feature 180° recline, extendable leg rests, and 4D armrests for gamers who need long-session comfort.

9. Height AeroPlus Adjustable Desk

Our electric sit-stand desks offer four programmable height positions, helping you stay productive and avoid long sitting hours.

How to Find the Best Mattress Deals Online in India

Before choosing a mattress, focus on comfort, support, and durability. Our SmartGRID mattresses combine all three with advanced technology and long warranty periods.

We frequently offer discounts and deals on our website. You can also find the best offers during festivals and major shopping events such as New Year sales.
